title: Savanna update
description: Savanna expansion datapack/mod, add structures, trees, items, mobs and more
body:
![Savanna expansion update](https://i.imgur.com/v8Eqc6F.png)

YOU NEED OPTIFINE TO SEE THE VARIANTS ADDED.

Savanna update is a datapack and resource pack that modify the 3 savannas biomes inside minecraft.

- Add 4 passive mobs variants.
- 1 new underground structure, like trial chamber but smaller.
- 1 new pillager tower with pillager variants.
- 2 new trees, and 2 new "oasis" structures that will generate naturally in the world.
- 1 new weapon that you can only obtain in new pillager tower.

![Pillager and breeze variant savanna](https://i.imgur.com/8O1qHfL.png)

- BEST FEATURES:
1- You can destroy acacia leaves to obtain floatings bananas, which will give you levitation effect for 5
seconds. Just like apples falling for trees, bananas now fall from acacia leaves.

2- New enchantment Path of the Wind, that allows you to run faster in "path dirt", like a kind of soul speed.

![savanna new trees](https://i.imgur.com/CUTqpIU.png)
